hardware.tofwerk.lib package¶

class hardware.tofwerk.lib.TofDaq.TwRetVal(value)[source]¶

Bases: Enum

An enumeration.

TwAborted = 12¶
TwAcquisitionActive = 1¶
TwDaqRecNotRunning = 0¶
TwError = 5¶
TwFileNotFound = 3¶
TwInvalidParameter = 10¶
TwInvalidValue = 11¶
TwNoActiveAcquisition = 2¶
TwNoData = 7¶
TwOutOfBounds = 6¶
TwSuccess = 4¶
TwTimeout = 8¶
TwValueAdjusted = 9¶
